So, the code outline:

class Solution {

    public int longestDecomposition(String text) {

        int n = text.length();

        // Precompute prefix_hash and power

        long[] prefix_hash = new long[n+1];

        long[] power = new long[n+1];

        int base = 911382629;

        long mod = 1000000000000000003L;

        power[0] = 1;

        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {

            power[i] = (power[i-1] * base) % mod;

        }

        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {

            prefix_hash[i] = (prefix_hash[i-1] * base + text.charAt(i-1) - 'a' + 1) % mod;

        }

        // Memoization table

        int[][] memo = new int[n][n];

        for (int[] row : memo) {

            Arrays.fill(row, -1);

        }

        return helper(0, n-1, prefix_hash, power, mod, memo, text);

    }

    private int helper(int left, int right, long[] prefix_hash, long[] power, long mod, int[][] memo, String s) {

        if (left > right) {

            return 0;

        }

        if (left == right) {

            return 1;

        }

        if (memo[left][right] != -1) {

            return memo[left][right];

        }

        int max_k = 1;

        int len = right - left + 1;

        for (int i = 1; i <= len / 2; i++) {

            int newLeft = left + i;

            int newRight = right - i;

            if (newLeft > newRight) {

                break;

            }

            long hashLeft = getHash(left, left + i -1, prefix_hash, power, mod);

            long hashRight = getHash(right - i +1, right, prefix_hash, power, mod);

            if (hashLeft == hashRight) {

                int inner = helper(newLeft, newRight, prefix_hash, power, mod, memo, s);

                int current_k = 2 + inner;

                if (current_k > max_k) {

                    max_k = current_k;

                }

            }

        }

        memo[left][right] = max_k;

        return max_k;

    }

    private long getHash(int l, int r, long[] prefix_hash, long[] power, long mod) {

        if (l > r) {

            return 0;

        }

        long res = (prefix_hash[r+1] - (prefix_hash[l] * power[r - l + 1]) % mod) % mod;

        if (res < 0) {

            res += mod;

        }

        return res;

    }

}

int helper(int left, int right) {

}

class Solution {

    public int longestDecomposition(String text) {

        int n = text.length();

        // Precompute prefix_hash and power

        long[] prefix_hash = new long[n+1];

        long[] power = new long[n+1];

        int base = 911382629;

        long mod = 1000000000000000003L;

        power[0] = 1;

        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {

            power[i] = (power[i-1] * base) % mod;

        }

        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {

            prefix_hash[i] = (prefix_hash[i-1] * base + text.charAt(i-1) - 'a' + 1) % mod;

        }

        // Memoization table

        int[][] memo = new int[n][n];

        for (int[] row : memo) {

            Arrays.fill(row, -1);

        }

        return helper(0, n-1, prefix_hash, power, mod, memo, text);

    }

    private int helper(int left, int right, long[] prefix_hash, long[] power, long mod, int[][] memo, String s) {

        if (left > right) {

            return 0;

        }

        if (left == right) {

            return 1;

        }

        if (memo[left][right] != -1) {

            return memo[left][right];

        }

        int max_k = 1;

        int len = right - left + 1;

        for (int i = 1; i <= len / 2; i++) {

            int newLeft = left + i;

            int newRight = right - i;

            if (newLeft > newRight) {

                break;

            }

            long hashLeft = getHash(left, left + i -1, prefix_hash, power, mod);

            long hashRight = getHash(right - i +1, right, prefix_hash, power, mod);

            if (hashLeft == hashRight) {

                int inner = helper(newLeft, newRight, prefix_hash, power, mod, memo, s);

                int current_k = 2 + inner;

                if (current_k > max_k) {

                    max_k = current_k;

                }

            }

        }

        memo[left][right] = max_k;

        return max_k;

    }

    private long getHash(int l, int r, long[] prefix_hash, long[] power, long mod) {

        if (l > r) {

            return 0;

        }

        long res = (prefix_hash[r+1] - (prefix_hash[l] * power[r - l + 1]) % mod) % mod;

        if (res < 0) {

            res += mod;

        }

        return res;

    }

}

int helper(int left, int right) {

    if (left > right) return 0;

    if (left == right) return 1;

    for (int i=1; i <= (right - left +1)/2; i++) {

        if (hash of left..left+i-1 == hash of right-i+1..right) {

            return 2 + helper(left +i, right -i);

        }

    }

    return 1;

}

To solve this problem, we need to split a given string into the maximum number of substrings such that each substring is symmetric around the center. This means that the first substring should match the last, the second should match the second last, and so on.

### Approach
The approach involves using a recursive function with memoization to efficiently explore all possible splits of the string. The key steps are:

1. **Precompute Hashes**: Compute prefix hashes for the string to allow quick substring comparison. This helps in efficiently checking if two substrings are equal.
2. **Memoization**: Use a memoization table to store the results of subproblems to avoid redundant
